commands.summary: Renderer TypeScript build and browser bundle passed after adding decision triage lanes and relationship-aware People grouping.
27 renderer interaction tests passed, including coverage for all seven decision lanes and People grouping for operator, family, trusted, external, agents, systems, unknown, and blocked.

environment.process_note: OCX-002/003: Decisions now uses explicit triage lanes, and People groups contacts by relationship/trust with distinct unknown and blocked treatment.
